channel.title: World
channel.description: The Washington Post World section provides information and analysis of breaking world news stories. In addition to our world news and video, Post World News offers discussions and blogs on major international news and economic issues.

item.title: Ukraine turns war into a video game, with points and prizes for kills
item.dc:creator: David Stern
item.description: Kyiv says the Army of Drones Bonus system, in which points may be redeemed for weapons, is the first of its kind anywhere.

item.title: Some Iranians abroad say they’d fight for the regime. Others want to topple it.
item.dc:creator: Mustafa Salim, Lorenzo Tugnoli
item.description: Members of the diaspora in Iraq, from Sunni Muslim Kurds in the north to Shiite Persians in the south, are as divided over the war as Iranians back home.

item.title: A court in Kenya blocks U.S. plan to keep American Ebola patients in Africa
item.dc:creator: Rael Ombuor, Lena H. Sun, Adam Taylor
item.description: A facility built by the U.S. military on a Kenyan air base was intended to isolate Americans exposed to Ebola during the growing outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo.
